name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 49 of operational silence. MASHHAD MURAL DAY 5 OF 7-DAY REFUTATION WINDOW (CLOSES 2026-05-04); MOJTABA SILENT THROUGH TRUMP-AXIOS REJECTION + RIAL 1.8M COLLAPSE — NO PUBLIC RESPONSE TO EITHER. The two highest-stakes events of the past 24 hours (Trump's Axios 'choking like a stuffed pig' rejection of Hormuz-First doctrine and rial collapse to 1.8M record low) produced NO Mojtaba video, no Mojtaba statement carried by IRNA/Press TV/Tasnim/Fars in current-event framing. The regime has 48 hours left in the 7-day refutation window. Per Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier, Mojtaba is 'figurehead, not principal' — IRGC inner circle led by Vahidi dominates. ISW Day 8: 'unable to seriously impact Iranian decision-making due to injuries.' NYT prosthetic-leg detail intact. Mashhad mural exists, regime has NOT refuted. Pravda EN Apr 28 'Mojtaba is firmly in control and has met in-person with high ranking officials including Pezeshkian' is RUSSIA STATE MEDIA CLAIM, single-source/uncorroborated by Western or Iranian-independent outlets. Brief should NOT call Mojtaba dead (factual claim requires regime confirmation) but SHOULD note the silence is now 49 days running, mural unrefuted at Day 5 of 7. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Reuters Apr 28 analysis 'Iran's Guards Seize Wartime Power, Blunting Supreme Leader's Role' (carried by USNews, Times of Israel, Japan Times, Al-Monitor, Express Tribune, Fox News, Israel Hayom, MarketScreener, Kathmandu Post): 'Mojtaba Khamenei's role is largely to legitimize decisions made by his generals rather than issue directives himself' — explicitly names Mojtaba as FIGUREHEAD, NOT PRINCIPAL. Three Iranian-deliberation sources cited. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
